Strategy Overview

Technology decisions your board can stand behind.

We work alongside your leadership team to cut through complexity — turning ambiguous technology choices into clear, confident decisions backed by real-world data and senior practitioner experience.

  • 100% vendor-neutral advice

    No affiliate relationships — only what's right for your business

  • Board-ready deliverables

    Executive decks, risk registers and roadmaps your leadership can act on

  • Senior practitioners only

    You work directly with architects and CTOs — no junior handoffs

Audits completed

2–4w

IT Consultation

30 daysPost-engagement support
What We Do

Every advisory capability, in one engagement.

From a one-off audit to an embedded fractional CTO — we cover the full spectrum of strategic technology guidance.

Tech Stack Audits

Deep, honest reviews of your architecture, code health, security posture, and team workflows — with a prioritised action plan, not a laundry list.

Architecture Design

Future-proof system blueprints built around your business constraints — with clear trade-offs documented so leadership can make confident decisions.

Cloud Strategy

AWS, Azure, GCP and hybrid plans tuned to your growth trajectory and cost model — no over-engineering, no vendor lock-in.

Vendor & Tool Selection

Unbiased, structured evaluation of SaaS platforms, agencies and integration partners. We have no affiliate relationships — only your best interests.

Team Augmentation

Embed senior engineers, architects and fractional CTOs with your team on demand — from one day a week to full-time for a sprint.

Roadmap Planning

12–24 month delivery roadmaps aligned to commercial outcomes, with effort estimates, risk flags and quarterly milestones your board can track.

Deliverables

What you walk away with.

  • Executive briefing deck (board-ready)
  • Technical architecture document
  • Risk & dependency register
  • Quarterly roadmap with cost model
  • 30 / 60 / 90 day action plan
  • Vendor comparison matrix
  • Post-engagement Q&A support (30 days)
Platforms & Tools

We speak your stack.

Deep hands-on experience across all major cloud platforms and infrastructure tooling — so our advice is always grounded in real-world implementation.

AWS
Azure
GCP
Kubernetes
Terraform
Datadog
Snowflake

100% vendor-neutral. We have no affiliate relationships and no incentive to recommend any particular platform. Our only brief is what's right for your business.

Our Process

From brief to roadmap — five clear steps.

A structured advisory process refined across 120+ technology engagements.

01

Discovery

Stakeholder interviews, goals, constraints, business context.

02

Audit

Stack, codebase, ops, security, vendors and team structure.

03

Synthesis

Findings consolidated into risks, gaps and quick wins.

04

Roadmap

Prioritised plan with effort, cost model and 30/60/90 days.

05

Enablement

Workshops, documentation and ongoing advisory support.

Client Stories

What our clients say.

Start your IT consultation

"The technology roadmap Webcore Solutions produced was the most actionable document we'd had in three years. It cut our infrastructure costs by 30% in the first quarter."

Michael Torres

Head of Engineering, Avanta Systems

"We were locked into a stack that couldn't scale. Webcore's IT audit identified exactly what to rip out and what to keep. Six months later, our systems are stable and our team moves faster."

Rania Aziz

COO, Meridian Group

"Webcore's cloud migration roadmap was thorough and risk-aware. The phased approach they recommended meant we didn't lose a single day of uptime during the transition."

James Hartley

VP Technology, Apex Financial
